feature_order_note: The listed order must not be changed because it matches the saved model input matrix.

features.label: BET specific surface area
features.help: Specific surface area of the photocatalyst.

features.label: Oxidant concentration
features.help: Use 0 when no oxidant is present.

features.label: Molecular weight
features.help: Molecular weight of the pharmaceutical pollutant.

features.label: Hydrogen-bond donor count (HBDC)
features.help: Hydrogen-bond donor count from a consistent molecular database such as PubChem.

features.label: Hydrogen-bond acceptor count (HBAC)
features.help: Hydrogen-bond acceptor count from a consistent molecular database such as PubChem.

features.label: Topological polar surface area (TPSA)
features.help: Topological polar surface area of the pharmaceutical pollutant.

features.label: Solution pH
features.help: Initial or controlled solution pH used in the experiment.

features.label: Light source
features.help: Coding used during model development: UV = 1, visible = 2, simulated solar = 3.

features.label: Photocatalyst dosage
features.help: Mass concentration of photocatalyst in the reaction solution.
